After this period, the SIM functionality (network calls, mobile data, SMS) is blocked by the PTA until the required import/tax duty is paid to register the device.Tax/Duty (Non-PTA Fix): To use the phone permanently with local SIMs, the owner must pay the PTA-mandated tax duty. description: "Sparliv Men is a multivitamin and mineral supplement that has been formulated with 18 essentials ingredients for the support of male health. Sparliv Men is a combination of Vitamin A, C, D, E, B complex and six key ingredients i.e., Zinc, Selenium, Panax Ginse'ng, Ginkgo Biloba, Tribulus Terristris and L-Arginine. Sparliv is an excellent source to support male health, alertness, energy and vitality throughout the day. Daily fatigue in a men`s life is associated with a busy, hectic lifestyle, and symptoms may include: lack of energy, decreased mental and physical performance, lethargy and lack of concentration. Benefits: Sparliv Men contains power of 18 essential ingredients that Boost Vitality, Energy & Reproductive Health Enhance Body Immunity Improve Muscle function and provide strength Strengthen Cognitive Function Strengthens heart function and supports brain health. Common Side Effects: Generally, this preparation is well tolerated. Diarrhea may occasionally occur during treatment with beta-carotene (Vitamin A precursor) and the skin may assume a slightly yellow discoloration. The side effects of vitamin A are reversible. Vitamin C and vitamin E may cause diarrhea and other gastrointestinal disturbances. Although these side effects are generally mild and go away on their own, if they persist, seek medical attention. Recommended Dosage: Recommended dosage of Sparliv Men is 01 tablet a day orally, or as advised by the physician. Warnings and Precautions For Arginine: Arginine is not recommended for patients following a heart attack. For Ginkgo biloba:  As the use of Ginkgo may increase the tendency of bleeding, please consult your physician/ pharmacist if you are on or intend to start using any other medicines and before you undergo any surgical/ dental procedure. For Ginse'ng: Contraindicated in pregnant women. Safe use in lactating women and children has not been established. Do not exceed the stated dose. Safety on long term use has not been established"

name: Dr Fiora Veeva-M, Valerian sleeping tablets 400mg | Herbal blend of Valerian root for Sleep, stress, relaxation and balanced mood
description: Sleep onset & perceived sleep quality — Valerian root is widely used as a natural sleep aid. Some studies report that it helps people fall asleep more quickly (reduced sleep latency) and improves “subjective” sleep quality (how rested you feel, how you rate the sleep), especially in people with mild insomnia or disturbed sleep. Mayo Clinic+2PubMed+2 Relaxation & stress / anxiety relief — Because valerian is believed to exert a mild sedative/calming effect on the nervous system, it may help reduce stress, tension, or mild anxiety — which in turn can aid relaxation and make it easier to unwind before sleep. WebMD+2Mayo Clinic+2 Mild to moderate insomnia or sleep difficulties (especially short-term / occasional) — For some people experiencing mild sleep issues (rather than chronic or severe insomnia), valerian — particularly when used over several weeks — may offer support, especially when combined with good sleep habits. NCBI+2PubMed+2 Generally well-tolerated when used short-term — Most research suggests valerian root is relatively safe for short-term use at moderate doses (e.g. 300–600 mg per day)
